title: Handle RPL DAO lifetime-zero as immediate route removal
description: Trigger: the root processes a DAO Transit Information option with path_lifetime == 0 for an existing target. lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c installs or keeps the target/edge around line 610 instead of applying No-Path semantics. Impact: stale downward routes can persist until a later expiry pass, so traffic may be sent along routes the child explicitly withdrew. Treat lifetime zero as immediate removal of the matching route/edge.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
